title: peteravenia schultzii
side_effects: Peteravenia schultzii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to liver damage and kidney failure. Additionally, the plant's high levels of toxic compounds can cause seizures, tremors, and even coma if ingested in large quantities. It is essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Peteravenia schultzii for any health purposes.
